title: thyrsanthema piloselloides
intro: Thyrsanthema piloselloides, also known as the hairy lettuce or yellow buttons, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Thyrsanthema piloselloides can be consumed as a tea or infused in oil for herbal preparations, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
